title_en: Movie Gen: A Cast of Media Foundation Models
title_zh: Movie Gen：一组媒体基础模型
abstract_en: Movie Gen presents a family of large media foundation models for high-quality video generation, editing, personalization, and synchronized audio synthesis.
abstract_zh: Movie Gen 提出了一组大型媒体基础模型，用于高质量视频生成、编辑、个性化和同步音频合成。
editorial_summary_zh: 代表 Meta 在高保真视频世界建模与可编辑媒体生成上的系统化推进。
editorial_summary_en: A strong signal of Meta's push toward large-scale editable video world modeling.
why_it_matters: It expands world-model style media generation into a broader stack that combines video realism, instruction following, editing, and audio.
